inputs.text: {"high_level_description": "A bold retro travel poster of a red panda astronaut planting a flag on Mars, clean flat vector art, vivid colors.", "style_description": {"aesthetics": "Mid-century travel poster, flat vector shapes, clean crisp lines.", "lighting": "Bright even graphic lighting.", "medium": "Vector illustration", "color_palette": ["#E2503B", "#F4C430", "#2B2D42", "#FFFFFF", "#8D99AE"]}, "compositional_deconstruction": {"background": "Deep red-orange Martian sky with a large pale sun and distant craters.", "elements": [{"type": "text", "bbox": [60, 120, 250, 880], "text": "VISIT MARS", "desc": "Large bold condensed sans-serif title in cream with a slight retro drop shadow."}, {"type": "obj", "bbox": [360, 320, 830, 690], "desc": "A cute red panda in a white spacesuit holding a small flag, flat vector style."}, {"type": "text", "bbox": [860, 260, 950, 740], "text": "IDEOGRAM 4", "desc": "Small uppercase tagline in yellow."}]}}
